item.title:
paddypower: Paddy Power @paddypower · 20min About that early pay out on Arsenal...
18+ GambleAware Cita Paddy Power @paddypower · 7
item.description:
Paddy Power @paddypower · 20min About that early pay out on Arsenal...
18+ GambleAware Cita Paddy Power @paddypower · 7 feb. EARLY PAYOUT
The Gunners are now 9 points clear at the top so we are PAYING OUT on Arsenal to win the league.
Nothing could possibly go wrong now, right Arsenal fans?
Online and Retail. No max stake. Paid as cash.
18+ GambleAware 5 13 90 26 mil
